strategy: Team fight (~15,000 health, two Shadow Guardians): hit with Life (+30%); the Prophet resists Death 71%.
Do not heal with normal spells. His Acrimony turns all incoming healing into damage for the fight. Recover with Death drain spells instead, which are not converted.
Kill the Shadow Guardians first. Their permanent Shadow Sentinel intercepts 90% of your damage, so hits on the Prophet are mostly wasted until the Guardians are gone.
Be careful with Auras. Casting one after Round 1 makes him Supernova it off and reapply Acrimony to everyone. Only overwrite it on Round 1 if you plan for it.
With the Guardians down, stack blades and Feint, then land one big Life hit.
cheatNotes: On Round 1, and on late joins, he casts Acrimony on all Wizards, turning your healing into damage for the fight. Heal with Death drains instead.
Casting an Aura on Round 1 replaces one Acrimony and shortens the timer to 4 Rounds, matching your Aura.
Casting an Aura on any later turn makes him Supernova it off and re-apply Acrimony to everyone.
Healing received from drain spells is not converted, so drains still heal you.
Both Shadow Guardians cast a permanent Shadow Sentinel (intercept 90%, +80 block, -30% incoming). Kill them before hitting the Prophet.
